description: UDOH: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by Utah.
citation: R432-100 / Utah Department of Health Health Facility Rules

description: UDOH: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear; two-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
UDOH: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
UDOH: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width.
UDOH: Surgical suites 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
UDOH: Utah does not have a Certificate of Need law. Hospital construction requires UDOH plan review and facility licensing. Intermountain Health HQ state — active construction market.
citation: Utah Code §26-21 / UDOH Health Facility Licensing — No CON

description: UDOH: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space.
